summary: Frontend-only re-validation of TrustBridge Counsel iteration-2 changes (light/dark alternation, new WhoThisIsFor, new ServicesShowcase + standalone /services, dark ContactSection). All 13 listed feature checks PASS via Playwright on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Zero console errors on / and /services.
critical_code_review_comments: Carry-over from iteration_1: Footer 'Book a Consultation' uses navigate('/#contact') correctly; ServicesShowcase.handleBook still uses window.location.href = '/#contact' for non-home routes (causes a full page reload). Functional but inconsistent with Navbar/Footer behaviour — consider using react-router useNavigate to keep SPA semantics.
ContactSection now uses noValidate on the form so the custom toast.error path is reachable (good — addresses iteration_1 finding).
Contact form is still fully client-side (toast only, no persistence) — confirmed per agent context (MOCKED).
Service collage images are Unsplash placeholders — all 8 images load successfully (naturalWidth > 0) (MOCKED placeholders, OK).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified on https://executive-counsel-3.preview.emergentagent.com. Home DOM order (top→bottom): hero-section(0) → why-section(4000) → center-quote-section(5056) → trust-value-section(5744) → who-this-is-for-section(6888) → services-showcase(8235) → contact-section(10905) → site-footer(11905). All monotonically ordered. WhoThisIsFor: 3 cards (Couples / Corporate Teams / Business & Leadership), who-cta-book scrolls #contact into view (top≈0.3 viewport). ServicesShowcase: 3 service blocks (couples=4 items, corporate=3 items, business=2 items), each with cta and italic closing line; service-{cat}-cta scrolls to #contact. All 8 collage Unsplash images return naturalWidth>0 and complete=true. /services route renders services-page + services-showcase + 3 blocks. nav-cta-book on /services correctly navigates to /#contact and scrolls (final url=/#contact, contact top≈2475). Hero CTA has cta-pulse class and scrolls to contact. Contact form: empty submit shows error toast 'Please share your name, email, and a brief message.', valid submit shows success toast 'Thank you — your request has been received in confidence.' and form fields reset. Footer renders brand, navigate links, contact placeholders (email/phone/location), and 'Confidential · Respectful · Solution Focused' bottom line (uppercase via CSS). /about renders about-page+page-shell-cta; /blogs renders blogs-page+page-shell-cta. Zero console errors on initial loads of / and /services. NOTE: TrustValueGrid uses data-testid='trust-value-section' (not 'trust-value-grid' — consider aligning if PRD spec wants the latter).
